claude_relationship_pattern: Specific typed links (part_of/produces/created_for/uses/informed_by/depends_on) plus associated_with for uncertain same-project/same-user links.
codex_relationship_pattern: Only informed_by/supports/depends_on, all project->generic-knowledge within a single conversation, all medium confidence, all requires_review.
claude_position: Codex relationships are specific in TYPE but shallow in COVERAGE (only intra-conversation, no produces/part_of of real artifacts, no cross-conversation links).
codex_position: 12 relationships, specific types, all flagged for review.
recommended_resolution: Adopt Codex's specific-type discipline; expand coverage to artifacts/outputs/context and cross-conversation links as Claude did.
